name: Car Group Limited
analysis: CAR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$26.5100, stop A$23.9085, target A$29.8203 (1.27:1) — then trail it.
